full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Implementing the ISA algorithm using scikit-learn components.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Implement the ISA (Independent Subspace Analysis) feature learning pipeline from the Le et al. CVPR 2011 paper using scikit-learn's PCA and FastICA. Include patch extraction, PCA whitening, ICA, subspace pooling, and SVM classification.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated the full pipeline code including extract_patches, pca_whiten, isa_pool, and extract_clip_features functions.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified each function against the paper's description: PCA whitening matches Section 2.1, ISA pooling matches Equation 1, feature extraction matches Section 3.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added detailed docstrings and paper references to each function. Adjusted hyperparameters for CPU feasibility.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How do I visualize the learned ISA filters by projecting ICA components back to pixel space through PCA?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Showed how to multiply ICA mixing matrix by PCA components to reconstruct filters in pixel space.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified the math: W_pixel = W_ica @ PCA_components gives filters in original space.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added subspace labels and formatted the subplot grid.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Implement the ISA feature learning pipeline from Le et al. CVPR 2011 using scikit-learn.
top_5_prompts.why_important: The core implementation of the method being reproduced.

top_5_prompts.prompt: How do I visualize learned ISA filters by projecting ICA components back to pixel space?
top_5_prompts.why_important: Essential for demonstrating what the ISA model has learned.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 2.2.
